_comment: Sanitized competitor intelligence summary. Auto-generated and updated by tools/competitor_snapshot.py --export-summary. No raw HTML, screenshots, or PII. Safe to commit. Add competitors with: python3 tools/competitor_snapshot.py --add-competitor <url>

schema.competitor_id: string — stable identifier; used as directory name under pipeline/competitor-snapshots/
schema.url: string — source URL registered in source-registry.json
schema.canonical_url: string or null — canonical URL found in the page HTML
schema.title: string or null — page title from OG tags or <title>
schema.og_description: string or null — Open Graph description
schema.video_tags: array or null — YouTube keyword list from ytInitialPlayerResponse.videoDetails.keywords (hidden from YouTube UI; primary competitor SEO signal)
schema.hashtags: array or null — #hashtags from video description or TikTok textExtra
schema.chapter_markers: array or null — [{timestamp_ms, title}] from chapteredPlayerBarRenderer or description timestamps
schema.category: string or null — YouTube category string from playerMicroformatRenderer.category
schema.publish_date: ISO date string or null — YouTube publishDate from microformat
schema.upload_date: ISO date string or null — YouTube uploadDate from microformat
schema.is_shorts_eligible: boolean or null — YouTube Shorts eligibility flag
schema.schema_types: array or null — schema.org @type values found in JSON-LD (e.g. VideoObject, Article)
schema.confidence: high | medium | low — extraction confidence based on acquisition method
schema.snapshot_date: ISO date string or null — date of the HTML snapshot used
schema.channel_name: string or null — editorial field; fill in after research
schema.scale_tier: nano (under 10k) | micro (10k to 100k) | mid (100k to 500k) | macro (500k plus) — label [unverified] unless from platform API
schema.primary_aesthetic: string or null — editorial; one-sentence description of visual identity
schema.content_pillars_overlap: array or null — editorial; Creator OS pillars this channel also covers
schema.differentiation_notes: string or null — editorial; where this channel differs from creator positioning
schema.overserved_topics: array or null — editorial; topics heavily covered that should be treated as saturated
schema.underserved_topics: array or null — editorial; topics not covered that represent gap opportunities
schema.top_performing_formats: array or null — editorial; formats (tutorial, haul, transformation) that perform well
schema.source_artifact_id: string or null — artifact ID from web-intel-engine retrieval
